mapper.update: update osh_user_tool_quota set remaining_count = remaining_count + #{addCount}, total_buy_count = total_buy_count + #{addCount}, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where tool_id = #{toolId} and user_id = #{userId} and delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: insert into osh_user_tool_quota ( user_id, tool_id, remaining_count, total_buy_count, used_count, last_use_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_flag ) values ( #{userId}, #{toolId}, #{initCount}, #{initCount}, 0, null, #{operator}, now(), #{operator}, now(), 0 )
